payload:
Local only. Apple Silicon. Follow the 5-step plan in .ralph/current_direction.md. Step 1: download and verify BitNet-2B-4T runs locally. Step 2: train a python LoRA
  adapter on it. Step 3: train 5 domain adapters and test composition with 1/N scaling. Use bitnet.cpp or HuggingFace — no RunPod. Read references/BITNET_SOLE_RESEARCH.md and the QVAC blog
  for how to fine-tune BitNet. No side quests.

exp_bitnet_ternary_adapter_composition: SUPPORTED. Ternary LoRA (QAT+STE) composes 4.4% better PPL than FP16 LoRA, 19% lower pairwise cosine, 9.7x smaller storage. Mechanism: directional decorrelation from quantization noise, not magnitude normalization. All 3 kill criteria pass (3/3 seeds). Unblocks exp_mote_sole_architecture + exp_bitnet_grassmannian_init.

exp_bitnet_ternary_adapter_composition: SUPPORTED (review PROCEED). Ternary LoRA composes 4.4% better PPL, 19% lower cosine, 9.7x smaller. Unblocks exp_mote_sole_architecture + exp_bitnet_grassmannian_init. Next: follow 5-step BitNet plan (research.start pending).

exp_mote_sole_architecture: KILLED. MoTE top-k routing fails at micro (d=64): router accuracy ~50% at k=1, wrong routing causes 10-42% worse PPL than equal-weight 1/N. K3 also FAIL: ternary experts 13.5% worse individually (threshold 10%). Routing needs macro-scale representations (d=4096). Consistent with prior content_aware_routing kill.

exp_mote_sole_architecture: KILL confirmed by adversarial review. MoTE top-k routing fails at micro (d=64): routed PPL 10-42% worse than equal-weight at all k values, ternary experts 13.5% worse individually (threshold 10%). Router training unstable across seeds. Consistent with prior content_aware_routing kill. consecutive_kills=2.

exp_bitnet_orthogonality_trained: KILLED. Ternary base mean |cos|=0.276 vs FP16 0.260 (+5.9% WORSE). K1 fail: ternary does not improve orthogonality. Ternary composition benefit comes from magnitude bounding/quantization recovery, NOT from feature separation. consecutive_kills=3.

exp_bitnet_orthogonality_trained: KILLED confirmed by adversarial review (PROCEED). K1 fail: ternary mean |cos|=0.276 vs FP16 0.260 (+5.9% worse). Ternary base does not improve orthogonality. consecutive_kills=3.

exp_bitnet_adapter_magnitude_analysis: KILLED (K1). Magnitude bounding hypothesis killed — ternary adapter norm variance 2.6x HIGHER than FP16, not lower. K2 PASS (ratio 1.71). Real mechanism: activation compression (ternary post-FFN acts 2x smaller, logit CV 15% lower). consecutive_kills=4.

exp_bitnet_adapter_magnitude_analysis: KILLED (K1), adversarial review PROCEED. Magnitude bounding hypothesis killed — ternary norm variance 2.6x HIGHER. Activation compression correlational only. consecutive_kills=4. Integrated to FINDINGS.md.

exp_bitnet_grassmannian_init: KILLED (K1). AP-init 19.2% lower |cos| but below 30% threshold. Improvement from orthonormal init, not Grassmannian packing (Nr=20 < d=64, trivially solved). Individual quality 14% better (orthonormal + ternary STE synergy). consecutive_kills=5 on BitNet track.

exp_bitnet_grassmannian_init: KILLED (K1) confirmed by adversarial review. AP/Rand |cos| ratio=0.808 (threshold <0.70). Improvement from orthonormal-init, not Grassmannian packing. 5th consecutive BitNet-track kill. consecutive_kills=5.

exp_bitnet_2b_real_composition: SUPPORTED. First LoRA fine-tuning of real BitNet-2B-4T on Apple Silicon via MLX. K1-K4 all PASS. Composition ratio 3.59x (threshold 10x). Unit-weight slightly beats 1/N. Mean |cos|=0.0010. 3/5 domains converged at 200 steps. Caveats: single seed, 200 steps, PPL-only eval, train/val contamination.

exp_bitnet_2b_real_composition: SUPPORTED. Adversarial review PROCEED. consecutive_kills reset to 0. HYPOTHESES.yml, FINDINGS.md, VISION.md updated. Caveats: train/val contamination, under-training, single seed.

exp_capability_expert_taxonomy: SUPPORTED. 4/4 capability types (reasoning, instruction, conciseness, safety) compose orthogonally on BitNet-2B-4T. Cap-cap |cos|=0.000530 (MORE orthogonal than domain-domain 0.000983). K1 PASS, K2 PASS. 9-adapter composition beats base on all eval sets. Caveats: single seed, 200 steps, BitNet-2B-4T only.

## Reason
max_runtime

## Status
Stopped at runtime limit.

## Summary
- Iterations: 13
- Duration: 4h 17m 54s
- Exit code: 2
